title: A Fairy Tale II - Cure a Queen

startPoint.en: Talk to Martin the Master Gardener in Draynor Village.

quests: A Fairy Tale I - Growing Pains

rewards.display: 2,500 experience lamp (skill must be level 30 or higher, bankable)

rewards.name: Fairy ring
rewards.display: Access to the Fairy rings network and the Fairy Resistance Hideout

rewards.name: Magic essence
rewards.display: Ability to make Magic essence potions

rewards.name: All's Fairy in Love and War
rewards.display: All's Fairy in Love and War (Fairy Resistance hideout)

text.en: Talk to Martin the Master Gardener in the Draynor Market. (opciones de chat: 2 Talk about farming problems and fairies. • Accept)
After 5 minutes have elapsed, talk to him again. (opciones de chat: 2 I suppose I'd better go and see what the problem is, then.)
Go to Fairy Nuff's cottage, north of the Zanaris bank.
Enter the house and take Nuff's healing certificate from the floor in the south-east corner. Keep this in your inventory throughout the quest.
Right-click Study Nuff's certificate (using Read will not allow you to reach the Fairy Resistance HQ).
Head south and read the rune temple sign, on the ground south of the cosmic altar.

Talk to the Fairy Godfather (located in the Throne Room) about the Queen's disappearance. (opciones de chat: 1 Where is the Fairy Queen? • 1 Do you have any idea who could have done this? • 1 Yes, okay.)
Talk to the Co-ordinator just north of the throne room at the crossroads. (opciones de chat: 2 The fairy rings.)
Talk to Fairy Fixit near the fairy ring, south-west of the wheat field.
Make sure you have Nuff's certificate in your inventory. It can be retrieved from her grotto if lost.
Equip your dramen or lunar staff, click on the fairy ring, and teleport to the following codes (in this order):
(Dialling this will appear to fail and take you back to Zanaris; continue regardless.)
In the Fairy Resistance Hideout, talk to Fairy Nuff and Fairy Very Wise in the northeastern clearing.

Return to Zanaris and pickpocket the Fairy Godfather for the queen's secateurs (may take several attempts). The Fairy Godfather, Fat Rocco and Slim Louie need to be looking away from you when you pickpocket.
Return to the Resistance Hideout by selecting the "Fairy Resistance HQ" option in the Fairy Ring. Nuff's certificate must be in your inventory.
Talk to Fairy Nuff.
Travel to the Cosmic Entity plane using .
Wait for a starflower to spawn (may take 1-2 minutes).
Pick the star flower and use it on a vial of water.
Ensure you have equipment required to fight at least one gorak, then travel to the Gorak Plane using .
Kill Goraks until you receive gorak claws.
Grind the Gorak claws, then use the resulting gorak claw powder on the magic essence (unfinished).
Return to the Resistance Hideout by first teleporting back to Zanaris by choosing "Use Fairy ring" and then clicking the Fairy Resistance HQ as a teleport destination.
Talk to Fairy Nuff.
Right-click use the magic essence (3) on the Fairy Queen. She is laying on the stretcher near Fairy Nuff, not as an interactable NPC.
Finish dialogue with the Fairy Queen.
Quest complete!
